description: Petition, Mamluk period, 1442. Draft of a petition from the Jewish community of Fustat to the Mamluk government concerning the malpractices of ‘Abd al-Latif the physician, head of the Jews, who is reported to have sold portions of pious foundation properties and leased others below their value, imposed high fiscal penalties, and confiscated property of the Jews, among a litany of other harmful acts. The document requests his removal from office. (Mark Cohen, "Jews in the Mamlūk Environment: The Crisis of 1442 (A Geniza Study)," BSOAS, 1984, 431-4) EMS
tags: physician, State, Mamluk, draft, 15th c, communal, Petition
description_he: עצומה, 1442 לספירה. מקהילת יהודי פוסטאט לממשלת הממלוקים נגד עבד אל-לטיף הרופא, ראש היהודים, שמכר נכסי הקדש, השכירם בחסר, הטיל קנסות כבדים ותפס רכוש. הקהילה דורשת הדחתו.
